backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the mailto anchor link for profxhandyman@gmail.com in Contact.tsx was replaced with a plain non-clickable text element.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, including contrast improvements, font weight updates, and the email link removal.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, border, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page layout with Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer sections, with no CustomizationPrompt overlay.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying company story, founder quote, and a grid of trust highlight cards with icons, using font-medium for body text and darkened badge borders.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section component that displays the email address profxhandyman@gmail.com as plain non-clickable styled text, alongside a phone CTA link and a contact info sidebar.
frontend/src/components/CustomizationPro: Empty file; the CustomizationPrompt dialog component has been removed with no content remaining.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column footer component with brand info, quick links, services list, and contact details using upgraded text contrast classes and font weights.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, strong white overlay, headline, tagline, call-to-action buttons, and animated stats grid.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a logo, desktop nav buttons, a 'Get a Quote' CTA, and a mobile hamburger menu that toggles open/closed.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying eight handyman service cards (plumbing, electrical, carpentry, etc.) in a responsive grid, with a section header and a service-area banner.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Oswald and Inter fonts, defining CSS custom properties for the design system (orange, ink, snow palettes), and Tailwind utility overrides.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Oswald/Inter), oklch-based color palettes (orange, ink, snow), box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the ProfX Handyman site, recording the current version, existing features, and noting that the contact email is displayed as plain non-clickable text.
